DECLARATION TO RESET HEARING DATE DUE TO NON SERVICE OF THE CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRASKA IWAMURA, JENNA EMIKO SANTOS NEWBERG, AARON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF JENNA EMIKO KRASKA IWAMURA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AARON SANTOS NEWBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 415 DE HARO STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FREDDIE PECCERINI, MANAGING AGENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. BAILIFF: DEPUTY WILSON. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-28-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-17-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 415 DE HARO STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRASKA IWAMURA, JENNA EMIKO SANTOS NEWBERG, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 415 DE HARO STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION $3,538.02 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,663.02, THE MONEY JUDGMENT IS STAYED PENDING THE REMOVAL OF THE BILL IN THE SAME AMOUNT. IF THE BILL BACK IS REMOVED THE MONEY JUDGMENT IS VACATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,568.59 FILED BY KRASKA IWAMURA, JENNA EMIKO SANTOS NEWBERG, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT 415 DE HARO STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
